info.title: VanFlow API
info.description:
Cash-van mobile-sales backend.

**Auth:** all endpoints (except `POST /auth/login`) require a bearer JWT — click **Authorize** and paste the `accessToken` from login.

**Success envelope:** every 2xx response is wrapped as `{ success: true, data, timestamp }`. The `data` field holds the payload documented per endpoint.

**Error envelope:** every non-2xx response is `{ statusCode, message, error, path, timestamp }` (the `ApiErrorResponseDto` schema). The standard 400/401/403/404/409/500 responses are listed on every operation.

code.description: Human salesman code used by the mobile app. Unique when set.

dailyQuotaFils.description: Daily revenue target in fils (1 JOD = 1000 fils)

code.description: Human salesman code used by the mobile app. Unique when set.

dailyQuotaFils.description: Daily revenue target in fils (1 JOD = 1000 fils)

recordedAt.description: When the device captured the point (ISO 8601). Defaults to server now() if absent.

newRepId.description: New rep UUID to own this customer

sign.description: Stock effect sign: -1 reduces, +1 increases, 0 none

secretKey.description: JoFotara API secret (plaintext; encrypted before storage)

code.description: Human route code used by the mobile app. Unique when set.

boundary.description: GeoJSON Polygon. First and last positions of every ring must be identical (closed).

code.description: Human route code used by the mobile app. Unique when set.

boundary.description: GeoJSON Polygon. First and last positions of every ring must be identical (closed).

customerId.description: Customer UUID; segment is resolved from their AI profile

price.description: Sale price in fils (1 JOD = 1000 fils)
Sale price in fils (1 JOD = 1000 fils)

fixedPrice.description: Fixed price in fils; overrides discountPct
Fixed price in fils; overrides discountPct

stopOrder.description: Override order; defaults to array index

repIds.description: Rep UUIDs to generate routes for

weekdays.description: Weekdays the outlet is visited. 0=Sunday … 6=Saturday. Daily = all working days; one day = weekly; two days = twice a week.

isActive.description: Pause this schedule without deleting it

weekdays.description: Weekdays the outlet is visited. 0=Sunday … 6=Saturday. Daily = all working days; one day = weekly; two days = twice a week.

isActive.description: Pause this schedule without deleting it

entries.description: Full set of outlet schedules for the rep

unitPrice.description: Override unit price in fils; defaults to product.price

amountWords.description: Amount in words (Arabic). If set and mismatched, blocks confirm.

wordsMatch.description: TRUE if numeric amount matches the words

collectedAt.description: YYYY-MM-DD or ISO; defaults to now()

unitQty.description: Available stock for this unit in the van

message.description: Human-readable message. A string for most errors; an array of strings for validation failures.

example: quantity must not be less than 1

path.description: Request path that produced the error
